If you check @Polymarket and look at current FDV expectations for perp dexs, everything looks bearish. That's mostly driven by the current market cycle. But perp dexs metrics haven't dropped off materially.

Take Avantis as an example - its post-TGE FDV was $2.5B+ in September 2025. But during Avantis bull phase (Apr-Aug 2025), the platform averaged $95M in daily perp trading volume.

Now, in a bear market:

Nado: $300M average daily perp volume

Variational: $1B average daily perp volume

The perp dex market is deeply undervalued right now.
Much weaker projects launched in the past with significantly higher valuations.

While most people are throwing in the towel, I'm using this phase to farm points with lower competition and better risk-reward.

A question to @nadoHQ team:

In total, I've done around $100M in trading volume on the platform (including all my referrals).

Taking average commission costs of ~0.03% (mix of taker/maker), that means I've brought the project roughly $30,000 in revenue.

Right now I have ~14,000 points.

So does that mean 1 point needs to be worth at least $2.14 just to break even on what I contributed?

Interesting airdrops we have nowadays 

You bring real revenue to the project and in return you get… only points. Maybe at least open referral payouts? Or maybe you can somehow fix and set up the referral system properly? At this rate I'm just gonna leave Nado.

Other projects pay tiny influencers money for tweets that bring them zero revenue. Here I'm directly generating profitability for the project, I've been trading on Nado since December 2025, and all I get is points. Thanks a lot, lol.

The grants program is straight-up awful.
An acquaintance of mine vibecoded a simple site in a few hours, got a Nado grant and then just deleted it.

Meanwhile me and my buddy have been building @profundingpro for over 1.5 months - we've been ignored in the builders chat for more than a month and still got zero grants. 

I will always be honest with my audience. If something sucks, I'm gonna say it. Only through healthy criticism can we actually build something good.

- Using my personal TG arbitrage bot that farms perp points via funding with near breakeven PnL (similar to @LorisTools setups)

🚨 @nadoHQ just rolled out a point boost for RWA markets — The timing couldn't be better.

Here's the macro thesis behind why this matters and how you can play it:

⚠️Not financial advice. Always DYOR.⚠️

The Fundamental Setup:
The US-Israel coalition launched military operations against Iran in Feb 2026. Since March, Iran has declared the Strait of Hormuz closed — the single most critical oil chokepoint on earth. The IEA called it the largest supply disruption in the history of global oil markets (~14M bpd affected).
Brent crude hit $118 last week. It's pulled back to ~$100 on ceasefire talks — but Iran has already rejected the latest US proposal.
Oil isn't just "in play." It's one of the most talked about name right now as this is the biggest oil disruption in history

The Thesis Plays:
1. Long Oil 🟢
Supply disruption is real and structural. Even if Hormuz reopens, the IEA flagged that production recovery in GCC states will be slow due to infrastructure damage. Brent anchored at $80–90+ is the base case. Upside if talks collapse again (which in the past few days has been leaning heavily on the peace talks is failing)

2. Short QQQ/SPY 🔴
Higher energy prices → persistent inflation → Fed rate decision stays higher for longer (or hikes). Kevin Warsh takes over as Fed Chair May 15 — he's historically hawkish -> Higher borrowing costs compress valuations and weigh on growth stocks. 

Two Ways To Position:
Strategy A — Conviction play: Long Oil + Short QQQ/SPY Full stagflation bet. Oil surges on sustained disruption, equities get crushed by rate pressure. Both legs move in your favor.

Strategy B — Range hedge: Short Oil + Short QQQ/SPY Playing both sides of uncertainty: if a ceasefire lands and oil dumps, leg 1 wins. If inflation stays sticky and markets roll over, leg 2 wins. 
Neutral on geopolitics, bearish on macro.

All of these plays exist within @nadoHQ 's RWA market and right now they're running a point boost, meaning your trades stack toward higher $INK yield while you're positioned.

Lots of plays. Lots of ways to size. Trade now on Nado 👇

✍️现在的NADO=半年前的Variational

Perps泛滥成灾，最佳埋伏时机是头矿

头矿挖的好，等大部队进场即可躺平

过去一周在 @nadoHQ 刷了1.2 M，怒赚185U

还有几个码子，非常稀缺，准备认真挖头矿的发私信

@variational_io @StandX_Official

看来真没啥人撸毛了

上周在 @nadoHQ 随便刷了1M

积分居然拿了610，排名前200

这挖矿效率貌似比头矿还高

弱弱地问下：有没有场外群，如果1U/分，我可以持续出

✍️Perps的机会在头矿，Lighter如此，Var同样

当大部队还没加入时，小资金、低磨损就能撬动高积分。以Var为例，半年前一起开刷的群友，随便玩玩就有几百分，如今积分规则一出，难度瞬间提升N倍。

目前还有头矿机会的Perps项目是Kraken交易所搞的 @nadoHQ ，打法跟Var类似：每刷1M解锁1个码子，积分未上线，人少不卷。

我手里还有几个邀请码，好不容易搞到的，准备认真刷Nado的私我，最好附上其他台子的交易数据。

其他台子还在正常刷，Var、 @StandX_Official 等，不追求交易量，而是严控磨损、最好PNL为正，这样的好处是：即使未来赛道熄火，空投不值钱，你也没啥损失。

✍️概括下 @nadoHQ 最新声明：

✅低分、多号选NFT的赢麻，还可以参与二次分配

✅高分选NFT的亏麻，亏的非常彻底，这部分玩家贡献了最多的手续费，却拿到了最低的回报

我是小丑，将近2000分兑换了NFT，过去虽然一直在跟官方反馈，推出统一的积分兑换标准，退换高积分选手多余积分，但官方决定一意孤行，不做评价。

✍️冷知识：Nado NFT分3个等级，根据积分高低分配

T1: 17个，市场成交价2 E
T2：113个，地板价0.78 E
T3: 1070个，地板价0.38 E

我大号消耗1600多分，拿到T2，还算满意吧，看来团队智商在线，接下来坐等NFT权益公布和积分二次分配。照目前情况看，积分消耗多者重新分配的积分也越多。

@nadoHQ 官方既然将NFT设置为可流通，应该有做市的能力，毕竟这是市场可以直接感知到的“脸面”，如果这么小的NFT盘子都控制不好，那还玩个屁。

Nado算是近期不错的毛，短平快还不卷。都说Perps赛道很卷，但实际情况是很多人的执行力真的非常差，我前后发出去40个Nado码子，至今还有十几个交易量为0，后面会手动剔除。

Today @nadoHQ  points went live and this is my base scenario valuation per point

This is based on the historical performance of other CEX tokens, knowing that market sentiment will play an important role

Additionally, Kraken will likely have its own stock, which could impact the long-term growth of $INK either positively (stronger brand/narrative) or negatively (diversion of focus/capital)

It's difficult to make precise valuations since we're talking about Kraken's L2 token, but the only comparable CEX's L2 tokens we have are:

> Mantle (Bybit): ~$5.5B FDV
> Cronos (Crypto .com): ~$9.1B FDV

All the other ones are just "utility" tokens:

> OKB (OKX): ~$2.2B FDV
> Bitget (BGB): ~$3.4B FDV
> LEO (Bitfinex): ~$8.7B FDV 
> KCS (KuCoin): ~$1.5B FDV
> GT (Gate .io): ~$2.9B FDV 
> HT (HTX): ~$1.6B FDV 
> WBT (WhiteBIT): ~$17.4B FDV 
> MX (MEXC): ~$820M FDV 

(I won't consider Binance, as it's effectively an L1)

For my base scenario I will consider:

> 8M retro-points

> TGE in 8 months from now (6–8 months range confirmed)

> 1M weekly points (?) → over ~32 weeks (8 months) = 32M additional points

> 40M points in total (8M retro + 32M future)

> 5% of total supply allocated to Nado users (?) 

> 2B FDV for Kraken's L2 token  (?) 

This leads to: 1 point ≈ $2.5

Do you play?

➟ The Under-the-radar perp DEX

@nadoHQ is a high-performance CLOB perp built on Ink L2 network, offering:
- spot trading
- perpetual futures
- unified margin 

Nado combines:
- offchain order matching for speed
- onchain settlement for security

▸ Core Architecture

Nado uses an offchain sequencer for 5-15ms trade execution and an onchain risk engine on Ink L2 for settlement, batching orders to minimize MEV. 

This hybrid design provides CEX-like performance while maintaining self-custody and transparency. The oracle (powered by @chaoslabs), aggregates prices from CEXs and DEXs with anomaly detection.

▸ Key Features

Unified margin pool supports spot, perps, lending, recognizing hedges for better capital efficiency.

NLP (Nado Liquidity Provider) vault enables yield on idle deposits via market-making and liquidations.

Built-in TradingView charts, low fees (as low as 1.5 bps), and HFT-ready APIs.​

Multiple collaterals and portfolio-level risk checks.​

▸ Performance Metrics

- $52.93M TVL on Ink
- $10.89B perp volume in 30 days
- $3.17M fees in 30 days (annualized $38.68M) 
- Cumulative perp volume exceeds $14.5B, with 24h perp volume at $600M

▸ Team and Backing

Developed by @krakenfx core engineering team, leveraging expertise from the secure CEX managing over $10B assets. 

Kraken launched Nado's test phase, tying it to @inkonchain (also Kraken-backed Superchain L2).

▸ Ecosystem Role

Nado positions as Ink's central liquidity hub, integrating with protocols like @tydrohq for points farming and yield.

 It's EVM-compatible on Ink for DeFi optimization.

▸ Alfa?

They're running private trading point program. Week 4 points have been distributed to only 9.4K users.

---

ESTRATEGIA AUTOMATIZADA A 0,03$/PUNTO EN PACÍFICA ESTA SEMANA CON FUNDING DESK
Además ya está @nadoHQ  integrado para poder operar DN. (te explico cómo configurar Nado al final del post)

Esta semana he conseguido farmear puntos de Pacífica a un coste aproximado de 0,03$ por punto usando @fundingdeskio.  Pero IMPORTANTE, Para llegar a un coste tan bajo hay que optimizar todos los parámetros, porque el coste final depende de muchas variables:

- Fees, spread, tamaño de operación, frecuencia, funding rates, open interest, daily activity y boosts.

➡️ Y uno de los puntos más importantes es conseguir semanalmente el boost del 25% en puntos. Para lograrlo, necesitas realizar actividad diaria en Pacífica.

➡️Por ese motivo, en mi configuración utilizo un Operation Sleep de 1380 minutos, es decir, 23 horas. (por cierto, cada 3 semanas hay que reiniciar la operacion automática por que hay un desfase de 1 día y se pierde el boost)

- De esta forma, el bot mantiene la posición abierta durante casi todo el día, la cierra mediante TWAP, espera 1 minuto y vuelve a abrirla automáticamente. 

➡️Para que no haya dudas, os dejo exactamente cuál ha sido mi configuración esta semana:

- He operado 2 PAXG y 2 XAU, con duration de 3 minutos, frecuencia de 30 segundos, Cycle Sleep de 1 minuto y Operation Sleep de 1380 minutos.

- Con esta configuración he generado 257k de volumen, con un PnL de -146$ y he recibido 4.700 puntos.

➡️Si crees que operar cada día aumenta demasiado el gasto, no reduzcas la frecuencia diaria. Reduce el tamaño de la operación:

- Prefiero hacer una operación diaria de 1 PAXG short y 1 XAU long antes que hacer solo 2 operaciones semanales de 3,5 PAXG y 3,5 XAU.

- La primera opción es más eficiente porque te ayuda a mantener el boost diario del 25%.

- Y ese boost, en la práctica, funciona como una reducción directa del coste por punto.

- Si consigues un 25% más de puntos por el mismo coste operativo, tu coste real por punto baja de forma muy significativa. Así es como puedes acercarte a costes como los 0,03$ por punto.

➡️ Además, HEMOS ELIMINADO COMPLETAMENTE LAS FEES DE FUNDING DESK. Por lo que utilizar FundingDesk es gratuito.

- El único coste real viene de la propia operativa, principalmente spread, funding si se vuelve desfavorable y costes asociados al trading en Pacífica.

➡️Y ahora, por petición popular, hemos añadido también NADO.

- Todavía no está disponible para TWAP automatizado, pero sí puedes usarlo ya para operar Delta Neutral desde FundingDesk.

- Eso sí, de momento las operaciones en NADO deben abrirse y cerrarse de forma manual (La automatización está en camino)

- Para conectar tu cuenta de NADO, el proceso es muy sencillo:

➡️Entra en FundingDesk →Ve a Settings →Después a API Keys → Haz click en Add new connection→ Selecciona NADO → Ponle un nombre a tu cuenta →Y conecta tu wallet EVM (Metamask, Rabby etc…)

(IMPORTANTE)

- Antes de conectar la wallet, necesitas tener seleccionada la red Ink. Si no tienes Ink seleccionada previamente, la conexión dará error.

- Esto ya lo estamos solucionando para que en el futuro no sea necesario seleccionar la red manualmente, pero de momento funciona así.

➡️Una vez conectada la wallet con la red Ink seleccionada, FundingDesk encontrará automáticamente tu API Key y solo tendrás que aceptar.

➡️Seguiremos añadiendo proyectos para operar DN de forma automatizada. Ya estamos trabajando para integrar Extended, Variational, Lighter, y Markets by Kinetiq (Hyperliquid)

FundingDesk acaba de empezar.

🐙 Kraken 海妖亲自下场做去中心化永续 DEX：Nado @nadohq 

交易使用有Nado + INK 潜在空投预期

当前状态：已开启 Alpha 测试，一码难求，只能排队申请。

申请入口：https://t.co/JpdJFGbdGe

Kraken @krakenfx不只是做交易所了，开始参考 BNB/Base 这条路， 也已经正式下场做公链生态了。基于Optimism 超级链，Kraken 推出了自己的 L2  Ink @inkonchain，并在2024 年 12 月 18 日正式上线主网。这一步是长期战略布局，其实和 Coinbase 做 Base 是同一条路线，把中心化交易所的海量用户，无缝引导到链上 DeFi 生态中。

Kraken 成立于 2011 年，是行业最早一批的老牌交易所之一，近期完成8 亿美元融资，估值约 200 亿美元，其中约 2 亿美元来自Citadel 的战略投资（这个城堡证券挺厉害的，全球最顶级的对冲基金与做市机构之一），同时也已启动 IPO 上市路径。这也让 INK + Nado 具备了少有的资金、背书、合规和品牌四重加持。

INK链推出的前半年，基本上还比较低调，生态没啥可玩性，真正的转折点出现在下半年，官方与 AAVE 达成合作，推出链上借贷协议Tydro @tydrohq，TVL 迎来爆发式增长，从 $6M 快速升至 $300M。同时，官方也已明牌推出 $INK 代币，并明确说了没有VC / 私募份额预留，代币分发主要通过生态行为进行分发，包括空投、流动性挖矿和用户激励，整体导向非常清晰，优先扶持真实使用者和长期参与者。

$INK 代币
未来是 INK 整条 L2 的公链币，不是某一个单一应用的 Token，其定位更接近于交易所系公链的平台资产，同类型的参考对象主要是 $BNB 以及未来正式发币后的 $BASE。当然，最终估值一定取决于生态是否真的跑出来、用户是否真的留下来，如果后续生态能够持续对上产品兑现、用户增长与真实流动性，那么这种公链 + 交易所系 DEX + 平台代币 + 生态闭环的组合，将有机会成为潜力标的。

🔹Nado
就在这个时间点，Kraken 团队亲自下场推出了 INK 链上的第一个旗舰级应用Nado @nadoHQ，这是一个去中心化永续合约 DEX（Perp DEX），由 Kraken 背后团队直接开发，并全面借力 Kraken 自身的流动性、合规与交易系统能力。

按照官方的定位，Nado 被视为补齐 INK 链最核心、最缺失的专业交易场景的关键一环。一方面以「CEX 级体验 + DeFi 自托管」的方式吸引真正的职业交易员进场，另一方面也作为 INK 生态对外破圈的第一张王牌，承担起带动整条 INK 链活跃度和真实交易量增长的核心发动机角色。

这一点也很好理解，很明显的是Base 有 Avantis，BSC 有 Aster，Aptos 有 Decibel ， INK的这张牌就是Nado。

Nado的底层架构采用的是链下撮合 + 链上结算的混合模式，配合中心限价订单簿和统一保证金机制，再借助Ink L2 的毫秒级出块速度，并通过NLP 被动做市金库为长尾币提供深度。说白了就是用中心化交易所的速度和深度，换成链上自托管的安全模式。

Nado采用低手续费模式，根据过去 30 天的总交易量（做市商 + 吃单商）而定，从入门级的低费用开始，逐步提升至高级返利，鼓励用户持续参与，且不设任何限制。吃单方手续费最低至 1.5 个基点，挂单方返利最高可达 -0.8 个基点。目标用户也非常明确，就是职业交易员、策略团队和高频选手，从设计上就是为“专业交易”这个场景而生的。

私测阶段（邀请制）

目前 Nado 处在Alpha 私测阶段（邀请制），我个人用下来的感受是：UI 很简洁、交易撮合速度确实快，但由于还在封测阶段，当前可交易的资产数量还不算多，偶尔有bug。从玩法机制上看，Nado 是在 11 月 19 日启动封测，测试期大约 1 个月，现在不能自由注册，只能提交社交账号 + 钱包地址，通过审核后才会发放测试资格。

激励🪂
官方明确表示：早期参与 Nado 的真实用户，将作为后续 $INK 代币空投的重要依据。官方的运营策略应该是稀缺的受邀名额+明确的空投权益+真实产品体验筛选核心用户。所以邀请制的核心意义其实就是有效过滤刷量，把真正的交易者筛选进来。

邀请里每交易100万美元可解锁1个邀请名额，最多可获得10个，待我在交易些，有邀请码后我会在一些给非Ai的亏友。

I thought a long time about whether to comment on @nadoHQ 's decision.
At first, I was skeptical. Dropping the Choice without prior announcement, especially in EU time, caught many of us off guard. I even missed it live and was frustrated the next day.
After thinking it through, I actually believe the Nado team handled this extremely well.
No pre-announcement meant:
1-no bots camping,
2-no influencer advantage,
3- no whale games.
Everyone had the same chance. You just had to be there.
If this had been announced early, NFTs would’ve been instantly botted. First come, first served in the worst way. Instead, it stayed fair and organic.
For those who minted an NFT, that’s a real jackpot.
I ended up with points, and I’m still fine with that.
Well thought out. Respect to the Nado team, and congrats to the minters.

-and one more thing that matters a lot.
If the team introduces staking for this NFT, the pricing dynamics will change completely.
Staking turns the NFT from a static collectible into a yield-bearing asset.
Supply tightens, sell pressure drops, and long-term holders get rewarded.

-Then there’s rewards:
Strong signals point to ~8% allocated through Nado. I fully expect NFT holders to be meaningfully rewarded. Future Nado or Ink-related airdrops are very likely to favor NFT holders as well.
And zoom out. This isn’t only about InkonChain.
This is about Kraken and tier-1 exchange with global reach, massive revenue, and real credibility.

Think about what that kind of backing means for OG NFT holders. Access, visibility, incentives, and positioning most people won’t appreciate until it’s obvious.

For those who minted, this wasn’t luck. It was seeing the setup early.

Who is using @nadoHQ ? NADO generates most of INK's transactions and creates fees. Do you understand what that means?

🌪️NADO CLI Trading Bot 

Built a relative-strength-based long/short pair trading bot running on @nadoHQ  Mainnet.

1) What I Built
- Generates signals by combining r6h / r24h / r72h momentum with volatility, spread, and funding penalties
- Constructs a portfolio of long stronger alts / short weaker alts, maintaining delta-neutrality with long ≈ short notional
- Fully automated from end to end: equity-based exposure management, order routing (market / TWAP), daily drawdown limits, health monitoring, and a kill-switch

2) Why CLI-First Was the Right Call
- Fast iteration — strategy ideas can be tested and validated immediately
- Stable command interface and JSON output ensure high pipeline reproducibility
- Easy operational automation via .env + PowerShell wrapper, with a low barrier to deployment
- Lower maintenance overhead compared to a full API implementation, making it well-suited for early live trading

3) What Would Make Nado Even Better
- Execution layer: batch orders, cancel/replace, idempotency keys, and standardized partial fill tracking — plus stable WebSocket streaming
- Risk & reliability: estimated liquidation price, stress testing, portfolio simulation, along with standardized error codes, retry semantics, and clearly documented rate-limit policies
- Operational maturity: permission scope separation (read-only / trade-only), audit logging, and pre-order cost transparency (fees, slippage, funding impact) — the building blocks for institutional-grade automation

Nueva estrategia 3x1 rentable con @xStocksFi 

Hace poco integraron el trading de los activos $SPY y $QQQ (S&P 500 y Nasdaq) en @nadoHQ, el Perp DEX de Kraken.

Esto abre muchas oportunidades, os explico:

Empezamos con que operando con estos activos ganaremos un x4 de puntos de Nado para el Airdrop de $INK (red de Kraken) y también es posible que para el propio de Nado (eso segundo no está confirmado).

Como he dicho estos activos ya se pueden tradear, pero ya han anunciado que lo siguiente a corto plazo es integrar el spot de los xStocks tanto en índices como acciones y metales.

1⃣Strategy 1: 
Long BTC/Short ETH
Type: Market Order

Timing: When market Pumps and ETH pump is 2-3% more than BTC in % terms

Booking Profit: Close both positions when market cools and ETH loses its higher gain and overall position turns profitable including trade fees.

2⃣Strategy 2: 
Short BTC/Long ETH
Type: Market Order

>Timing: If market dumps and ETH dumps 2-3% more than BTC in % terms

>Booking Profit: Close both positions when market Pumps snd ETH regains its relatibe strength to BTC and overall position turns profitable including trade fees

Points to note:

~ Always market open both trades one after another in equal sizes in opposite directions.

~ Close positions only when overall profit including all trade fees combined for all legs of trades.

~ If the market goes against your position and the total PnL becomes negative, remain patient and average in if possible. When volatility is high and the price gap between BTC and ETH widens significantly, you can trim the position that is in profit. This size difference can help the overall trade turn green once the market cools down.

~ beware of using this strategy on high trade fees DEXs, best to use in zero or low fee DEXs.

~ works both fir scalping as well as holding for more profit. I suggest scalp with small sizes.

~ start with small size to understand the concept.

I've been trading a bit on @nadoHQ the last few days, here's a review: (Ref links above and below): 
https://t.co/86puRmHRNR

Nado is Kraken's perps dex and partnered with INK, their chain. Nado is currently in closed beta, where you need an invite to actually sign up and try the dex. They've been live for about 4-6 weeks and although you're not SUPER early, I would still say that it's worth it to try out.

 Most big cexes have chains these days, with Base and Coinbase, MNT and Bybit, BNB and Binance, and so on. Ink is Kraken's version of this.

Although they're somewhat late to the game in both the chain and perp dex, I still think that Nado is a solid product so far. 

UI: I think is pretty clean, I have no complaints. Everything makes sense and is where it's supposed to be.

Pairs: There could be more pairs. Retail traders generally care about 2 things: UI & Pair selection, with some baseline volume. I think that they could definitely increase their shitcoin pairs and that would be appreciated. There are only about 20 total pairs (ish) to trade, most of them majors.

Functionality: Nado has all of the advanced orders that most dexes have, scale/twap/stop limit, etc. I haven't had a chance to try them quite yet but will probably check it out.

My plan: I was a bit late to farm Nado because I was still trying to do as many lighter points as I could the last month. Maybe a bad idea because the best time to farm these things is in the early stages where there aren't many people participating. I largely believe that the perp dex meta is mostly over- there are still dozens of these things that are out there, all with points programs...but I don't think that the 3rd, 4th, 5th, 6th, and so on perp dex will be very valuable. HypeLiquid and Lighter are both obvious #1 and #2 and this entire category should grow significantly over the next few years. But the bottom line  is that perp dexes are 97% the same in general and it's hard to really have a bunch of unique selling points on that last 3%. 

My plan is to farm Nado and probably mostly be done after this until the next interesting opportunity arises. Although I largely believe that you should be farming *something* if you are trading perps (for most people), I'm not sure what is next. I'll likely just keep playing on Nado for as long as it makes sense.

Nado Season 2👀

Season 1 officially ended, Season 2 is now live

In 16 weeks, 6 reached:
- $61.2B cumulative trading volume
- $53.2M TVL 
- 78,200 onboarded traders 
- 9,000 weekly active users

What’s coming in Season 2?

- Open Access

@nadoHQ is now open to everyone — no invite code needed anymore. Anyone can join and start trading from Season 2.

- New Points System

Instead of a fixed weekly emission, points will now be distributed based on the platform's average daily volume across each weekly epoch - the more volume traded on Nado, the larger the pool.   

Every week starts with a guaranteed 300K point floor that pays out regardless of activity, and rises toward a 950K point cap as volume climbs.   

Every dollar of volume earns points. The pool grows as protocol volume grows.

For example: 

$500M Average Daily Volume (ADV) → ~415k points 
$1B ADV → ~530k points

That means this update reduces point supply almost no matter what, since undistributed points are effectively removed from circulation.

If current activity levels remain similar, total future supply could end up closer to 36M–41M points instead of the previously expected numbers.

- Trading Competition #1

The first Trading Competition kicks off with Season 2, featuring a $100,000 total prize pool.

Two leaderboards: ROI and Volume. Rewards include both points and cash prizes.

- Referrals V2

Within the next few weeks, Nado will update its referral system by introducing fee-based commissions. 
The new model will run in parallel with the current points-based rewards, not replace them, giving users two ways to earn from referrals at the same time.

These are strong updates for the ecosystem. So right now is probably the best time to join Nado and start farming the future @inkonchain drop.

【両建てPERPの有力候補のNADO参戦🎉】

最近界隈のツヨツヨKOL達がこぞって参戦している、NADO（@nadoHQ）👀！

こちらもEtherealと同じく、超初期の今が最も美味しいと判断して猫山も両建て参戦しました☺

まだ開始から1カ月程度、出来高は既に平均3億/1日📈

SNSの認知度と明らかに乖離している、かなり期待値高めの穴場PERPとの見解

少し珍しいKrakenのレイヤー2であるINK上のPERPですね👀

実際に触ってみた感覚は

🧩手数料が相当安い（界隈でもTOPクラス）
🧩処理速度が速く板も割と厚め
🧩サクサク動くのでストレスフリー
🧩POST ONLYがしっかり機能する

こんな感じ👀

つまり両建てに必須の『手数料最小限でVOL・PNLを積む』にはかなり良さげ

実際にこちらもポイントシーズン開始前のEtherealと両建てしたところ、『10,000ドル当たり1㌦』程度

こちらはHyperliquidと同じく取引量に応じて手数料が変わるため、5M超えた後は『1万㌦当たり0.8㌦』の手数料で済みますね👀

さらには招待制度（リファ）も1M取引量につき1人まで、しかも最大20人までと結構厳格な感じも最高です👀

Variationalも同じ感じですが、やはりリファで飽和しない仕組みは最高ですな☺

猫山もこれからGRVTやVariationalとの両建てでボリュームを稼ぎ、リファ発行できるようになったら20枚ばらまかせていただきます👀

またそちらを踏んでくださったら、両建て裏NOTEもお渡ししますね

このNadoHQも相当両建てに適したPERPですから、Variationalと併せて『アーリーのダブルデカドロ』欲しいすね(*‘∀‘)！

また本日はGRVT（ @grvt_io )のポイント加算日！

こちらも1週間検証した結果が出る日なので、爆裂楽しみっす🤤！

週に15ポイントくらい出せれば、今でも相当美味しいですねぇ👀

さて今日も頑張って参りましょう☺！

【💰美味なるFR報酬でタダで両建てしよう💰】

NADO（ @nadoHQ  ）を数日両建てで触ってみたけど、非常に良いね☺！

上位OI銘柄は板が厚いので新興PERPの中ではストレスも少ないし…

さらに独自の強みとして、『FR（Founding Rate）が特強い』という特徴もあるね👀！

まずこれまでのPERPでは…

🧩Lighter：爆速＆手数料無料（今は結構多い）
🧩Variational：手数料無料＆損失返金
🧩GRVT：Vault激つよ＆業界初のマイナス手数料
🧩Extended：Vault内の資金も証拠金に使える

などなど

こんな感じにPERP独自の売りがあったのだけど…

このNADOも『Founding Rateが大きい』という特徴がありました☺よかったよかった

例えばNADOの『SOLのFR』は現時点では1時間毎に-0.0019％

年に換算すると、まさかの-16.88％
※もちろんFRは時間ごとに変動するので監視必須

なのでNADOでSOLのロングを保有している間でも、レバを掛けると結構な報酬になります

そんでもってVariationalやGRVT側でプラスのFRを探してショートすれば、両建てでダブルで報酬が貰える感じ

つまりこのNADOもまた、両建てにかなり適していますね👀

実際にFR報酬と保有期間ボーナス狙いで

🧩FRがマイナスのNADOでロング
🧩FRがプラスのGRVT※でショート
※両建てなら、どちらかが手数料無料がお勧め

このような両建てでも、保有し続けているだけで手数料を越える報酬額が貰えることも👀

もちろんFRは急変・反転することも多いので定期的な監視必須ですが、その点は皆様もご存じかと

さらにVariationalの『返金損失』を組み合わせると、損失無しでのPERPエアドロ二重取りも、割と現実的に狙えますね

同時に最近はVOLよりも『リアルなトレード実績』に対してポイント加算が強めになる傾向ですので…

ガンガン短期間でトレードして手数料を削るよりも、両建てで2～3日放置する手法は、ポイント効率の面でも良さそうですな☺

さらに大半のPERPのTGEは、来年Q1～Q2以降がメイン！

そのため重要なのは『途中で資金がショートしないように生き残ること』かもしれません

ですのでNADOやVariationalとの両建てを活用した『FR差』で手数料を賄いながら、無料でエアドロポイントを貯めるのが良い感じ☺

どうしてもポイント配布が良さげな超初期シーズンに無理矢理ポイントを稼ごうとしてしまったけど…

長期的に見ると、手数料を最小限に抑えながら長期的にポイントを稼ぐことの方が大切かも知れないっすな👀

Variationalでは焦って単トレでVOL稼ぎをしてしまい、結局それほど効率良くなかったので、反省してます💀

GRVTのVaultに預けてポイントと報酬を稼ぐもヨシ！
※GRVTのVaultは割とマジで優秀

NADO×VariationalのFR両建てで手数料・スリペ損失を賄いながら、二重エアドロするもよし！

お金がバチクソ減り易いシーズンですから、小賢しく生き残って参りましょう☺！

@grvt_io

Perp DEX 依旧是当下最好的赛道，可以多关注一些有潜力的 Perp DEX ，之前背靠 Ink + Kraken 的 Nado 火了一段时间，很多人现在还把  @nadoHQ  当成一个“刷分 Perp DEX ”。我觉得 Season 2 之后，Nado 的方向慢慢清晰了。

不是想做另一个 Perp DEX，想做的是 The Global Risk Engine ，全球风险引擎

这么说可能大家没感觉，链上的所有Perp DEX，本质都还停留在“单资产保证金时代”，每个仓位彼此割裂，Nado的模式是所有资产共享风险，比如黄金仓位给BTC合约做保证金，加密货币、股票、大宗商品和外汇最后全部塞进同一个链上账户里统一评估

这就是Global Risk Engine

这个模式看似简单，其实非常难做，不是简单的互为保证金，而是全球资产风险调度能力

所以看到第二季来了后，Nado开始暴露真实路线图了，大部分Perp DEX都上了股票、黄金、外汇，但都只是上了交易对而已

Nado的方向是这些资产互为抵押品，这是完全不同维度的产品，也就是它的Global Risk Engine

还有个很有意思的暗示，可能会把股票、黄金这些现实资产作为链上保证金，那Nado的Global Risk Engine魔力会真正显现，就是你可以同时持有黄金仓位，又能将黄金作为保证金，再去交易任何合约

优势就不用说了，会极大的提升资金效率，这可能是DeFi第一次开始真正吞噬TradFi的风险层

关于Season 2的积分，其实是减少的了，我觉得是好事，因为大部分项目，会在后续的积分赛季中选择通胀积分，这利于平台利益，但老玩家就吃屎了，Nado 的S1老玩家权益直接延续

积分这玩意，核心是个人比例问题，积分多少本身没有意义，100亿积分和1亿积分是一回事，最后看到还是平台本身的价值

现在大家对于Perp DEX的积分是非常谨慎的，因为雷了几个，大家其实可以同时在 Nado 和 Kraken Pro 上建立反向仓位——对冲市场风险，同时赚取 Nado 和 Kraken 积分。双重收益，方向性风险极低

选择delta-neutral策略，可以大幅降低风险，简单来说就是多空双开对冲波动风险，同时又能获取双重收益

现在Perp DEX确实越来越卷了，这是好事，会倒逼Perp DEX走出新方向，我最看重的是资本效率，也就是Nado的Global Risk Engine，会大幅提升用户资金利用率，但难在风险调度系统，非常期待跑出来

GM GM - Review 2 kèo trade xịn Nado + TradeXYZ - Các tip tối ưu khi cày perpdex 

@nadoHQ + @tradexyz là 2 kèo ad đang cày mạnh ở giai đoạn hiện tại. Ae nào quan tâm 2 kèo này thì có thể check qua lại bài cũ nhé 

- Hôm nay ad sẽ review lại hành trình cày cũng như các tip dành cho ae newbie muốn bắt đầu với mảng perpdex nha 

💠 TradeXYZ - nền tảng perp tiềm năng chỉ sau Hyperliquid

- AE trước khi bắt đầu có thể search AI để đọc thêm về đội ngũ đứng sau nền tảng này, phải có niềm tin thì mới có can đảm đốt phí để kì vọng airdrop. Hiện tại TradeXYZ đang là dự án perpdex được cộng đồng hyperliquid cực kì quan tâm 

- AE thấy trên hình ad có để, phí perp trên TradeXYZ khá cao (0.0432% / 0.0144%). Để trade hòa phí thì ae buộc phải đánh dương lệnh. Còn không thì thuần đốt phí + đốt tiền thua

- Ad trade chủ yếu cặp S&P500- USDC, chỉ cần dương vài % là ad cắt luôn. Mục tiêu là tạo nhiều volume với giao dịch thật. Hiện đã đạt hơn 300k volume 

📌  Lưu ý và tip khi cày TradeXYZ

- Cố gắng đặt tp/sl và xài lệnh limit để giảm gần 3/4 lượng phí. Cứ 10k volume nếu đặt market là tốn 4$ 

- Không đóng mở lệnh liên tục để tạo volume vì nền tảng sẽ tính đó là wash trading

- TradeXYZ hiện chưa có bất kì hứa hẹn hay cơ chế point nào. AE cày giai đoạn này là rất sớm. Nếu dự án ra mắt point trong tương lai thì lúc đó sẽ khó cày hơn rất nhiều. Whale vào thì ae hiểu r đó

💠 Nado - Perpdex hệ Ink 

- AD cày chủ yếu kèo Nado là vì token $INK, nhiều đồn đoán Nado sẽ là nền tảng được airdrop nhiều $INK nhất nên ae quan tâm thì có thể check qua nhé

- 2 tuần ad cày được 500k vol thì 140 point, trong đó ad đánh chủ yếu BTC/USDC perp. Tuần 2 được nhiều điểm hơn vì đánh cặp LIT với WLFI

📌 Lưu ý và tip khi cày Nado 

- Nếu ae có theo dõi dự án thì sẽ thấy bộ NFT Templars of the Storm với 3 độ hiếm. Khi sở hữu ae sẽ được lần lượt VIP 1,2,3 của dự án. Nếu thật sự muốn đẩy mạnh thì có thể trang bị thêm để giảm phí. Tuy nhiên giá NFT đang rất là chát (700$ cho phiên bản rẻ nhất )

➡️ Ngoài sở hữu NFT sẽ được thêm hệ số nhân ở season 1. AE cày thấy ng ta khoe cả nghìn điểm trên X thì cũng sẽ hiểu có ng xài NFT nha

- Tương tự với TradeXYZ, ae nên đặt tp/sl với lệnh limit để giảm phí

- AE trade các cặp có OI thấp sẽ được ưu tiên điểm hơn cặp BTC hay ETH. Cái này confirm từ nhiều OG Nado rồi nha

- Volume trên Nado không phải là tiêu chí tiên quyết. AE lưu ý kỹ để tránh cắm đầu tạo vol nhé. Phải giữ lệnh 1 thời gian

Allocated some funds into @nadoHQ. 

Nado is a dex on @inkonchain that offers a unified- margin for spot, perps, money markets and NLP yields deployed by Kraken.
 
Kraken on the other hand raised a total sum of $922M with the last valuation being at $20B 

 I deposited on Nado because of two things: 

> because Nado offers a solid edge in qualifying for the Ink airdrop (If it ever happens) especially because it is a featured product on the Ink ecosystem. 

> Nado offers a 2 in 1 play from my perspective. ( $NADO and $INK). 

Presently, Nado is on its first wave program which makes it a bit easy for points accumulation.. 

To get started with @nadoHQ, we would: 

・go to https://t.co/rPFGDPaiLU then connect our wallet. 

・after wallet connection, we would proceed by depositing some assets into Nado. 

We can either use the same chain deposit feature as well as the cross-chain deposit feature as well. 

・after depositing into Nado, we would continue by trying out the the perp/ spot terminal.  

For the spot terminal, there are only 3 pairs available namely; $kBTC, $WETH, $USDC with a daily volume ratio of about $600k+ which signifies less interest amongst market participants. 

For the perp terminal, there are about 24 different pairs available with the top 6 pairs pushing above $2M in daily volume. 

Personally, my go to terminal is the perp terminal because it is easier to generate more volume through there. 

・lastly, we would proceed to try out the NLP vault. 

The NLP vault offers a 16% APR and it helps in getting a better platform liquidity across diversified perpetuals strategies while capturing yields from liquidations and market-making.

The good thing about the NLP vault is that- the liquidity deposited into the vault can be used as a trading margin across spot and perp markets. 

Presently, the NLP vault is at its max capacity which means new users like me cannot deposit into the vault for now. 

I would make sure to drop an update after the vault max deposit gets increased. 

Stay tuned for more updates... 
 goodluck!

今天跟朋友讨论目前还有哪些项目可以挖，反正每天都是要交易的，各家差不多的话其实可以顺带手争取点额外红利。

他跟我提了 @nadoHQ  这个 @krakenpro  自己的 L2 上构建的 Dex，一方面毕竟有 Kraken这么个合规 CEX 做背书再差也不至于最后不发币 Rug，再一个刚好 Season2 要开始，排放减少而非通胀，积分的潜在价值有保障。

我自己去注册了一个账号体验了一下 Nado，也翻了他们的 Blog 和推文，大概分析出来他们自己的定位与其他竞品的不同，简单记录一下：

Nado 号称要做全球风险引擎(The Global Risk Engine)，一个把加密货币、股票、大宗商品和外汇全部纳入单一链上账户进行评估和保证金管理的地方。

简单说就是可以让包括 crypto，外汇，股票等资产都互为保证金，这有点牛逼啊，可以极大提高资金的使用效率。

比如我开了原油头寸可以用来 support 我开的英伟达股票风险敞口，而我的 BTC 多单可以拿来做黄金头寸的保证金。

说实话这种模式比简单的保证金生息更进了一步，也更有特色，从定位上说 Global Risk Engine 也比简单的 Perp dex 更有记忆点，不跟其他竞品同质化内卷。

另外具体刷分方面其实完全可以通过与 Kraken Pro 进行反向对冲，这一点朋友说他问过不会被女巫，同时赚 Nado 和 Kraken 的积分一鱼双吃是可行的。

从得知 Tradexyz 不会发币暂停后Perp 平台已经很久没撸过了，目前我初步调研下来觉得 Nado 应该是有兴趣撸的平台，后续会再调研一下他们发币的时机等信息，以及对冲单具体体验等，会持续 update。

We'll answer all of this in this thread. If you don't know Nado, stick around, and if you do know it, this will help you understand my idea of the approximate value per point.

Share if you like what you read and let's get started:

1️⃣The Nado Thesis

Nado is incubated by Kraken, which is the CEX that has built the L2 on ETH called Ink.

An L2 whose token INK is still not tradable.

Kraken has undergone a valuation for an IPO where they set their value between 16 and 20B according to recent data.

And....this is bullish for Nado.

2️⃣Nado is a perp dex that WILL NOT have its own token.

Instead, Kraken will give us the INK token as a reward for farming the protocol.

The INK token is the BNB of Binance. It's the BGB of Bitget. It's the typical manipulated exchange token.

But...manipulated? Believe me, that's GOOD.

CEX tokens are the ones that tend to rise the most, since there's more manipulation and supply control over them.

And this is positive for farming Nado.

3️⃣Polymarket and its bet...

Polymarket gives you a bet that the INK token could be around 500M FDV.

I think it's a fair valuation considering the current bad market conditions, but in regular market conditions and with Kraken going public at 20B in its IPO, I see the token at 1-2B.

4️⃣Mathematical Calculation.

If we assume that 8% of INK tokens will go to Nado, and that the farming extends for 32 weeks (giving 950k points each one), that would give a total of 30M points.

If they distribute 8% at a 1B valuation, that's 80M to distribute, divided by 30M points, it would give a total of $2.66 per point.

You can play around with this as you like:

🔴Bear case (500M FDV): $1.33/pt
🟠Base case (1B FDV): $2.66/pt
🟢Bull case (2B FDV): $5.33/pt

If you don't believe INK can reach 2B FDV, you should review the behavior of CEX tokens. They are the most manipulated.

5️⃣Does it work well?

Surprisingly, the perp dex works well.

It's cheap, the fees are low, the pairs have acceptable liquidity.

I'll leave you in the next tweet a code to enter and start grinding hard.

There are only 15 spots available for the fastest ones.

Greetings and happy farming,

.@nadoHQ x @inkonchain   - Why now is the best time for farming || part 1

Few people have actually calculated how attractive NADO is right now:

Straight to the point: among current airdrop opportunities, NADO is the most attractive by default. All Perp DEX farming strategies are similar, and I'll break down how to farm more efficiently under the same conditions in the next post
1️⃣ Why exactly now?

The key thing to remember: right now, NADO has almost no attention. Every week, a fixed number of points are distributed (I'll explain later how much 1 Point costs in dollars), but daily volume has dropped from $750M to $300M. That means for every $1M in volume right now, you get 2+ times more points than in the first week of February

Fresh example: in week 4 of Season 1, they distributed 950K points across 9.4K users. With falling volumes and fixed distribution, every dollar of your volume is worth more and more

When attention returns and volumes grow, efficiency will drop. Bear market = the best time for farming.

2️⃣ INK FDV: $1.5-4.5B

Two calculation methods

1. Coinbase → BASE → INK  
Coinbase (the only public exchange) has a market cap of ~$48B. Projected FDV for BASE: $2-4B (JPMorgan, DeFi Ignas, etc.). Kraken consistently holds roughly 1/3 of Coinbase's revenue, valuation, and volumes. So INK ≈ BASE FDV / 3.

2. CEX Revenue vs Token FDV  
Take the revenue-to-FDV ratios of Binance, Bybit, Crypto com and apply to Kraken's 2025 revenue. Closest analogs by revenue: Bybit and Crypto com ($2-2.5B).

Summary estimate:
🟠 COIN/BASE: Min $0.5B / Mid $0.75B / Max $1.0B  
🟠 vs Binance: Min $1.8B / Mid $2.7B / Max $3.6B  
🟠 vs Bybit: Min $1.5B / Mid $2.3B / Max $3.0B  
🟠 vs CRO: Min $2.0B / Mid $3.2B / Max $4.5B  
🟠 Total: Min $1.5B / Mid $3.0B / Max $4.5B

4️⃣ Points distribution: ~40M over 32 weeks

INK TGE is expected in 6-8 months (per NADO advisor @buyerofponzi   in a Jan 12 interview). Season 1 and Season 2 are roughly 11 weeks each.

🟠 Pre-Alpha: 8 weeks, 8M pts, 1M per week  
🟠 Transition: 2 weeks, 2M pts, 1M per week  
🟠 Bonus: 8M pts (Builder, Trading, Reserve)  
🟠 Season 1: 11 weeks, 10.5M pts, 950K per week (currently week 4)  
🟠 Season 2: 11 weeks, 11M pts, 1M per week  
🟠 Total: 32 weeks, roughly 40M Points

One of my most anticipated features on @nadoHQ is the "scale order" a feature you can hardly see on other Dexs let's discuss:

A scale order is a powerful trading feature that lets users place multiple limit orders across different price levels with a single click. Instead of setting each order manually, traders can create a ladder of buy or sell orders arranged in ascending or descending order, depending on their market direction. 
For example, if a trader holds 1 ETH and wants to sell it in increments as the price climbs, they can set a rule such as selling 0.1 ETH for every $50 increase. Once confirmed, the system automatically distributes these sell orders across the order book at $50 intervals until the entire amount is allocated. The same logic can be applied for scaling into long or short positions.

A scaling order feature is crucial for a perp DEX because it tackles several trading limitations that professional traders commonly encounter on decentralized platforms. Here's why it matters:

1. It enables smarter position management
Scaling orders allow traders to enter or exit positions gradually instead of all at once. This reduces execution risk, smooths average entry/exit prices, and mirrors how many professionals already manage risk on CEXs and advanced trading platforms.

2. It eliminates the need to place dozens of manual limit orders
Without scaling orders, users must manually input each order level, size, and price which can be time-consuming and error-prone. A single-click ladder system saves time, prevents mistakes, and creates a much smoother workflow.

3. It improves liquidity on the order book
When traders can easily place multiple orders across many price levels, the order book becomes denser and deeper. More resting liquidity makes the DEX feel tighter, more active, and more competitive with CEXs.

4. It enhances automation without requiring bots
Most traders lack the tools or skills to create scripts or trading bots. Scaling orders effectively give retail users a built-in micro-automation tool, letting them execute professional strategies without leaving the platform.

Nado DEX has even more advanced features on the way, built on @inkonchain to serve both professional and beginner traders. Its UI and UX feel like a top-tier CEX, maybe even better while remaining fully decentralized. The scale order feature is almost ready for mainnet and is currently live on Testnet. You can start testing it using the link below.

IMO @nadoHQ is one of the last decent +ev perp farming opportunities and it’s somewhat still early to do so.

Kraken has a weird equity bid and will likely aim to compete with Coinbase and base ecosystem in order to maintain it.

Basically all you can do on ink is trade Nado perps and use @tydrohq (lending market) so they likely push this pretty hard. Would not be surprised to see it tightly coupled with Ink token itself and further integrated within the core exchange similar to the Aero / Coinbase stuff happening right now.

Lighter is/was cool cause it was the first newish competitor to come after hype and used points + free trading in attempt to vamp (I think of this similarly to uni + sushi) + got the Robinhood check, however it’s basically over with TGE expected this month.

I certainly get the overarching narratives of others like Extended being the Revolut equivalent to Lighter but I don’t really think this compares to the opportunity with Nado. Besides Nado, Trade / Unit and some of the other equity / RWA exchanges are definitely interesting but who knows if Unit ever actually tokenizes and you probably have more time here.

I generally think a lot of the others are a bit of a reach and likely yield low outcomes.

Nado 성장 가능성 분석 📊

@nadoHQ 

최근 Perp DEX 시장에서 주목받기 시작한 프로젝트 **Nado**는
Kraken 출신 팀이 개발한 CLOB 기반 통합 트레이딩 DEX입니다.
Spot, Perpetuals, Money Markets를 하나의 통합 마진 시스템으로 제공하는 구조가 핵심입니다.

⚙️ 프로젝트 구조

Nado는 Ink 기반으로 구축된 CLOB DEX입니다.

핵심 기능

• Spot Trading
• Perpetual Futures
• Money Markets (대출/차입)
• 통합 마진 시스템

즉 거래 + 파생상품 + 대출 시장을 하나의 플랫폼에서 처리하는 구조입니다.

👨‍💻 팀 강점
Nado의 가장 큰 강점은 Kraken 출신 개발팀입니다.
CEX급 오더북 경험을 DeFi에 적용하려는 구조로
전문 트레이더 중심 플랫폼을 목표로 합니다.

현재 X 팔로워 약 25k+ 수준으로 초기 커뮤니티는 형성된 상태입니다.

📊 현재 단계 (중요)

현재까지 확인되는 온체인 데이터는 제한적입니다.

• TVL → 확인 데이터 없음
• 거래량 → 확인 데이터 없음
• 수수료 / 수익 → 공개 데이터 없음
즉 메인넷 트랙션이 아직 검증되지 않은 초기 단계로 볼 수 있습니다.

⚠️ 리스크

• TVL / Volume 데이터 부족
• Tokenomics / TGE 미공개
• Ink 체인 생태계 의존
• Perp DEX 경쟁 심화

🔎 정리

Nado는
• Kraken 출신 팀
• CLOB 기반 통합 트레이딩 구조
라는 강점이 있지만
현재는 실제 트레이딩 트랙션이 확인되지 않은 초기 단계입니다.

따라서 지금 단계에서는

👉 메인넷 / 인센티브 / TGE 발표 여부를 모니터링하는 전략이 가장 현실적인 접근입니다.

향후 온체인 거래량이 붙는다면
Perp DEX 시장에서 다크호스 프로젝트가 될 가능성도 있습니다.

讲讲这个刚内测、背景硬到发指、门槛高得离谱的项目—— @nadoHQ 

身份：Kraken（海妖交易所）根红苗正的亲儿子
状态：内测刚开不到20天，邀请码极度稀缺
核心：用CEX的速度玩DeFi，资产还自己管着
结论：动用所有关系搞一个邀请码，立刻开始！

简单说清楚它牛在哪：
背景叙事拉满：爹是Kraken，代表美国加密正统，背后还有专门为交易打造的INK公链。Nado是INK上的旗舰，资源全倾斜，这出身就是王牌。再加上Kraken的IPO在即，Nado很有可能是上市前的王炸产品。

技术层面：
撮合快（链下订单簿）：5-15毫秒，挂单改单免Gas，速度和币安一样。
资产安全（链上控制）：钱不离钱包，交易只是签个名（像支票授权），你的还是你的。
结算可信（链上验证）：所有交易结果批量上INK链公开清算，没人能动手脚。

预期一鱼多吃：玩Nado，很可能不仅赚它自己的空投，还能蹭上未来INK平台币的空投（想想BNB、OKB）。双重预期，早期数据金贵。

本人没有搞到码，但是据其他在跑的朋友反馈，体验非常丝滑。

注意：充值要用跨链桥到INK网络（支持Arb、Base等8条链），现在人少流动性薄，但正是建仓好时候。未来费率模型对做市商友好，套利空间还是很明显的。

最后说回邀请码：现在就去官推和Discord蹲着！互动、申请、候补，展示你的价值。别等开盘那天，又只能看着别人数钱🥲

My @nadoHQ results this week

Idk is this good or not but points are free

Make your results summary with https://t.co/81zYIShfux https://t.co/ujggSJNpuz

I built a Telegram bot to track your performance on @nadoHQ 🌪️

Just use the /nado command and send your wallet address - the bot will automatically pull all the data via API and generate a report with key metrics in both text format and as an image.

If you have a large trading history, you can also upload a CSV file - the bot will analyze it and generate a full report as well.

Analyzed 200+ @nadoHQ  reports from my bot https://t.co/UAnBxsCpGV to remove assumptions and see what actually drives points

Patterns are pretty consistent

1. Volume
Volume absolutely matters for raw points
but has clear diminishing returns for efficiency
Median by volume:
• < $50k → ~12.1 pts | ~511.6 PPM
• $50–100k → ~28.8 pts | ~528.8 PPM
• $100–250k → ~41.9 pts | ~367.3 PPM
• $250–500k → ~143.2 pts | ~368.3 PPM
• > $500k → ~304.5 pts | ~331.4 PPM
more volume → more points
but after ~100k, efficiency drops hard
if you’re optimizing for ppm, size alone won’t save you

2. Trade count
Median by trades:
• 1–5 → ~41.6 pts | ~8081.8 PPM
• 6–15 → ~17.6 pts | ~394.5 PPM
• 16–35 → ~50.3 pts | ~458.1 PPM
• 36–75 → ~39.4 pts | ~349.0 PPM
• >75 → ~135.7 pts | ~367.3 PPM

1–5 is noisy (outliers), wouldn’t rely on it
real takeaway:
pure churn ≠ optimal
moderate activity > spam

3. Holding time (strongest signal)
Median by hold:
• <1h → ~41.8 pts | ~395.0 PPM
• 1–6h → ~40.6 pts | ~357.1 PPM
• 6–12h → ~170.3 pts | ~384.3 PPM
• 12–24h → ~59.1 pts | ~442.3 PPM
• 1–2d → ~42.5 pts | ~642.5 PPM
• >2d → ~54.2 pts | ~578.8 PPM

This is where things get clear
nado rewards holding more than people think
not forever — but definitely more than quick in/out

4. PnL
Median by realized pnl:
• < -$500 → ~237.6 pts | ~304.2 PPM
• -$500 to -$100 → ~66.7 pts | ~363.8 PPM
• -$100 to $0 → ~28.4 pts | ~463.9 PPM
• $0 to $100 → ~32.5 pts | ~456.4 PPM
• $100 to $500 → ~114.0 pts | ~443.3 PPM
• > $500 → ~186.8 pts | ~334.6 PPM

No clean relationship
Higher pnl ≠ better points or ppm
Points are much more about structure than profitability

5. Maker share (strong negative)
Median by maker share:
• <10% → ~453.6 PPM
• 10–50% → ~297.6
• >50% → ~172.9

Hard to ignore
High maker share consistently underperforms

6. Market breadth
Median by active markets:
• 1 → ~375.7 PPM
• 2–3 → ~322.8
• 4+ → ~435.6
Best setups aren’t single-pair
But also not random chaos

Looks like: rotate a few markets, stay controlled

TL;DR
• more volume = more points, but worse ppm after ~100k
• spam trading doesn’t work
• holding is one of the strongest edges
• pnl doesn’t explain points
• high maker share looks bad
• multi-market > single market

NFTs aren’t included in the data, but from my own testing and what the community says, they don’t seem to provide a meaningful boost.

Nado @nadoHQ 这个项目，官方推特粉丝虽然才一千出头，但背后站着的，是Kraken的原班人马。

你没看错，就是那个以安全和硬核著称的K-Po交易所。这帮人出来做DEX。他们正在用“降维打击”的方式，解决一个让所有交易员都头疼的问题。

你肯定有过这种体验：现货账户和合约账户是分开的，保证金得来回划转，非常蛋疼。Nado想干的核心，就是把这堵墙给拆了，搞一个叫“统一保证金（Unified Margin）”的东西。

就是把你的整个账户变成一个巨大的、智能的资金池。你持有的现货ETH，可以自动成为你做空BTC永续合约的保证金。你的多头和空头风险可以实时对冲，资金利用率直接拉满。

为了实现这个，他们用了一套“链下撮合+链上结算”的混合架构，跑在一个叫Ink的L2上。效果怎么样？延迟低至5-15毫秒。这已经不是普通DEX的水平了，这是在对标专业的高频交易（HFT）系统。

当然，他们也没忘了DeFi玩家。可以把稳定币存进他们的NLP金库，成为流动性提供者，被动地赚取收益。

所以，你看Nado在做什么。它在用一套CEX级别的交易引擎和风控逻辑，包裹在一个去中心化、自我托管的DEX外壳里。目标用户非常明确，就是那些对性能、资本效率和交易工具有着极高要求的交易者。

目前项目还在非常早期的内测申请阶段，但这个“Kraken基因”和“统一保证金”的组合拳，已经足够让人把它放进重点观察列表了。它想做的，可能是一个真正意义上的、链上“万能交易所”。

Many people using @nadoHQ  to farm points for the airdrop have no understanding of the basics.

Weekly: 950,000 pts

But are you aware that there are fixed tiers?

Tornado - 0–3% of users
Storm - 3–10%
Wind - 10–25%
Gust - 25–60%
Breeze - 60–100%

What’s more, you also earn points from your referred users.

Both the quantity and, more importantly, the quality of your referrals matter.

* Referral Points are earned only when referred users actively trade on Nado.

* Points scale with the referred user’s trading activity, aligning incentives toward sustained, organic usage.

* Referrers earn a share of points generated by their referral network, with additional rewards extending to second- and third-level referrals.

However, you also need to keep other important factors in mind:

* Non-organic behavior - including referral farming or coordinated low-quality activity - may result in reduced or zero referral point allocation for a given weekly epoch.

*Non-organic behavior (including wash trading or self-matching) is prohibited and may result in reduced or zero point allocation for a weekly epoch.

So it’s worth keeping these points in mind before you actively start participating in collecting points on Nado.

Nado S2 and points calculations

I have to admit I was pretty surprised and skeptical at first, but the details make me very bullish for points holders.

What’s coming to @nadoHQ :

Open access for everyone without an invite code
A trading competition rewarding volume and ROI with a $100k prize pool
Real-world assets as collateral
Fiat on/off-ramp deposits
A new points distribution mechanism

Starting now, the number of points distributed each epoch depends on the average daily volume during that epoch:

Minimum: 300k points
Maximum: 950k points if volume exceeds $2B

Time for some calculations:

Over the last 4 months, the average daily volume during each epoch was around $300M. Let’s add 50% to account for higher activity growth.

$450M average daily volume = 370k points distributed per week.

With the launch of $INK expected by the end of the year:

End of Q3: 370k × 18 = 6.6M points
End of Q4 : 370k x 32 = 11.84M points

With 24,941,776 points already distributed during S1 and 2M set aside for builder codes and competitions, that would bring the totals to :

End of Q3 : 33,541,776 points
End of Q4 : 38,781,776 points

Assuming 5% of the total $INK supply is allocated to Nado.

Nado forces us to choose… but it wasn’t fair for everyone.

If you farmed @nadoHQ  during Private Alpha, you’re now forced to pick one reward outcome:
- Points
- Fee Refund
- NFT

To summarize:
- Bearish / done with Nado → refund
- Neutral but curious → points
- Bullish + woke up at ungodly hours → NFT

Deadline to choose: Jan 26, after that you default to Points.

> Timing
First, let’s address the elephant in the room: the drop timing.

the Choice went live around 1 AM UTC, and by the time EU farmers woke up… NFTs were gone.

So this wasn’t exactly a level playing field, whoever was awake or tracking closely got the most exclusive outcome.

> Options
🔹Option 1 - Points

This is the “future exposure” play.
But here’s the issue: you can’t accurately price a Nado point. 

Too many unknown variables:
- Total % of $INK emissions allocated to Nado?
- Total points in circulation?
- Duration of the campaign?
- Distribution among other major protocols in the $INK ecosystem?

With no answers, you can’t model whether points outperform a refund.

🔹 Option 2 - Fee Refund

This is the “risk-off” choice.
If you don’t plan to keep farming, or think Nado’s upside won’t compensate, you just take the fees back and exit.

🔹 Option 3 -NFT

1,000 supply for Alpha. FCFS. Most exclusive outcome by far.
I would’ve personally gone for the NFT if the timing was fair, rarity tends to be rewarded in these systems.

> My situation:
I wasn’t farming Nado as a priority.
- 600k Volume
- 466 points
- $140 fees

Not life-changing either way, but relevant for the decision.

> How I frame the decision:

→ If you’re done with Nado or regret farming → refund
→ If you’re bullish on Nado + $INK airdrop → points
→ If you were awake at ungodly hours → NFT

I’m leaning towards points, worst case I lose $140, best case points outperform.

But again, the inability to price points makes this a gamble.

> Overall takeaway:

Nado made us choose, but the process wasn’t equally fair, especially for EU farmers. Curious to see what others are picking 👇

㊙️讲下Nado，@nadoHQ 。
极有可能一鱼双吃的机会( Nado 空投 + Ink 空投)。  

1、赛道：属于Perps Dex，构建在Ink Layer 2网络上。
2、定位：“高性能订单簿DEX”，它不是简单的AMM，而是采用混合架构：链下高性能匹配引擎 + 链上风险引擎。 
3、生态定位： 属于Ink生态的核心DEX。 
4、当前处于封闭Alpha阶段，填表申请+邀请码的机制。

重点讲下团队： 
很多人不知道和Kraken的关系，Nado之前团队叫之前叫Vertex protocol，今年7月被海妖收购，所以把之前的业务停了，也把整个dex也迁移到ink上。所以，Nado现在是属于Kraken的内部项目，不是第三方孵化的概念。  

技术架构与创新点： 
1、链下Sequencer + 链上风险引擎，接近CEX速度，减少Gas费和滑点。 
2、统一保证金系统，提升资本效率。 
3、NLP（流动性提供者金库），用户存入闲置资金做市，赚取交易费+清算奖励；也可用于Perp交易（阶段性开放）。  

代币经济学与空投机制： 
Nado尚未TGE（预计2026 Q2），积分系统即将上线。  市场表现： 当前日交易量大概：~$230M ，TVL~$10M，NLP金库>$2M，参与人数不到2000。  

价值角度： 
Nado现在是Kraken的基础设施，属于“正规军”定位。
积分猎人首选（双投 $INK + $NADO ）。 

最大的问题在于时期，在目前激烈的Perps Dex赛道，属于起跑晚的选手。  

目前体验来讲：
整体还算流程，不过手续费偏高。  
📷目前邀请码很珍贵，还有几个，点个关注先，打算大干的考虑给到。

・ポイント効率が最悪、Season2はキツい

Season2が開始されて初週は先ほど説明したようにトレード大会があるので参加者が多いはずです。
それにも関わらずポイント配布量はかなり厳しくなっています。
効率だけで言うと、1ポイント取得するのに必要な手数料・ボリュームはSeason1の4.6倍。
大会参加中は効率が悪いトレードをしているのでポイント効率が悪化するのは予想してましたが、それでも厳しいです。
特に1ポイント手に入れる手数料での試算だと1ポイント=2ドル以上のコストがかかっているので大会がなければほぼ諦めるレベル

・今後続けるなら資金は少なめ

NADOのポイント稼ぎは今後も続けようとは思いますがポイント効率は悪化してるので参加量は減らそうかなぁ。
最終的なポイント量はおそらく5,000～8,000ポイント行けばいいかなと思っています。

@nadoHQ — a new perp DEX from the @krakenfx exchange, built on their own Ink blockchain.

According to the official account, Nado will have no native token and points convert directly to $INK. Also, on a stream by major KOL threadguy, an Ink and Nado advisor stated that Ink will launch in 6–8 months and DEX users will receive a significant share of the airdrop. Based on the stream date, we're expecting TGE around mid-summer.

The project is currently in a closed phase and access is invite-only — I have 500 invites for now: https://t.co/UuGzggBGOP

The first farming season started on January 30, during which 950K points will be distributed every Friday. Last week, points were distributed among fewer than 9K traders. For comparison, Variational gets squeezed by 25K users every week, and Ethereal by 14K+.

Also keep in mind: the earlier we enter the perp, the lower the point price — meaning proportionally lower risk and higher profit on costs. On top of that, there's currently a 4x boost active on WTI-PERP oil trading.

❗️ A bit of math

Based on crypto X, the average point value is currently around $0.4 (with an average position hold time of 5–6 hours), dropping after the boost was introduced.

Rough point count by the docs: from January 30 to mid-summer is ~24 weeks × 950K/week + 8M for Private Alpha Season + 2M for the 2 weeks between seasons + 8M reserved for various campaigns (building, trader competitions). That comes to 40.8M points — let's round up to 45M to account for liquidity and referral rewards.

Taking a conservative-optimistic FDV of $600M with 8% allocation to Nado: (600M × 0.08) / 45M = $1.07/point. That's already 2.5x in 3 months.

Considering that EdgeX launched on March 31 at $700M+ FDV, the boosted point farming, and Kraken's resources, the upside could be significantly higher.

⏬ So, what do we have

An official perp from an exchange with nearly a billion in funding, low competition, and attractive point pricing. By the metrics, this is a great opportunity to multiply your costs several times over within just a few months.

@nadoHQ  Season 2 is live.

The main shift: Nado is moving toward one unified trading account powered by its Global Risk Engine.

Not separate silos for crypto, equities, commodities and collateral, but one margin logic across the whole portfolio.

What’s new:

> invites are gone, Nado is now open to everyone
> $100K trading competition from May 25, 14:00 UTC to June 1, 13:59 UTC
> two leaderboards: ROI and Volume
> referral bonuses if your invite places in the top 10
> Season 2 points now scale with platform volume
> weekly points pool: 300K floor, 950K cap
> Season 1 points, tiers, NFT multipliers and referrals all carry over
> fee tiers are being updated, fees themselves stay the same
> Referrals V2 is coming with fee-based commissions on top of points
> The farming format is more complex now, but also more flexible.

You can earn not only points, but potentially cash prizes and referral fees too. The key change is that points emissions now depend on total protocol volume, so rewards scale with how much activity Nado actually gets.

Season 2 feels less like a simple points campaign and more like the start of Nado’s multi-asset trading venue phase.

Fresh and interesting direction in DeFi @spreads_fi
- Building airdrop and yield vaults on top of tokenless Perp DEXs   
- Essentially the Pendle Finance of Perp DEXs   
- First integrations: @nadoHQ, @pacifica_fi more coming    

Spreads’ first product consists of two vaults   

1) Yield Vault (PT concept)   
- Goal: maximize yield   
- Uses market-neutral strategies on Perp markets for stable returns  
- User positions work like Pendle’s Principal Token (PT)    

2) Points Vault (YT concept)   
- Goal: maximize points & airdrops  
 - Users forgo yield for leveraged points exposure   
- User positions mirror Pendle’s Yield Token (YT)

but here’s why @nadoHQ  gives you better cost to reward math

-> What I did on Nado?

On nado I was basically farming points

For $100 in burned fees, they credited me 130 points

Since I ended up slightly in the red, my cost per point came out to around $1.1

-> How I traded?

I only traded pairs with high Open Interest (OI)

Friends who traded low-OI pairs ended up getting multiple times more points than I did

-> My assumption about the points conversion

As we know, these points should convert into the INK token

And based on rumors, 10% of the allocation is supposed to go specifically to Nado

-> My rough valuation of points and the potential airdrop

If we assume Nado’s share is ~1/3, then (give or take) that’s around 30M points total

Project FDV could land somewhere around $2–3B

For the Nado airdrop itself, I’m expecting ~5–10% of the total supply

So the rough math looks like this:

-Airdrop size: about $100–300M

-Which would make 1 point feel realistically priced around $3–10 (in my opinion)

If it plays out like that, it’s a pretty easy x3–x10 on costs

Yeah, it’s not Lighter, but it’s a very realistic outcome

聊聊 @nadoHQ  这个项目，Ink 生态里的永续合约 DEX，最近我在调研 Kraken 积分计划的时候顺手扒出来的。

1⃣先说定位。
Nado 是基于 Ink 链的订单簿去中心化交易所，简单理解就是 Ink 生态版的 Hyperliquid 或 aster。
它 1 月 30 号正式上线第一季，到现在 4 月下旬大概跑了两三个月，严格说不算超早期，但相对而言还算早的阶段。

2⃣为什么我会在这个时间点把它单独拎出来讲，主要是因为它和 Kraken 积分计划是强关联的。
Ink 是 Kraken 自家的 L2，你在 Nado 上交互会在 Ink L2 上留下记录，有概率增加 $INK 空投的权重；
而 Kraken 那边参与积分计划同样是拿 Ink 积分。
所以这两个放一起做。

3⃣玩法上，我个人的思路是 Kraken + Nado 跨平台对冲。
Kraken 是 CEX，Nado 是 DEX，两边数据不互通，被判女巫的概率比在同一平台左右手低很多。
一边开多一边开空，尽量拉长持仓时间。

4⃣参与门槛方面说一下，Nado 目前是邀请制内测，没邀请码进不去。
我自己最早也没拿到码，后来是用之前讲过的办法——推特搜 "Nado code"，按最新排序，挑那种浏览量很低的（比如只有十几次的），大概率还没被用过。
完全没必要去闲鱼买，也没必要到处求人。

5⃣拿到码之后点 Start Trading 就能进界面，如果还没激活就会让你填 waitlist，邮箱 + 推特 + 电报 + Discord 四项，很简单。

6⃣积分规则简单过一下： 
· 每周五发放 95w 积分，主要三个来源——交易、NLP、推荐 · 之前有个 Private Alpha 奖金池，只限前 6 周，现在已经结束了，不用管 
· 还有交易者等级（L1/L2/L3）、Nado NFT、推荐奖励这些加成 · 每周结算，官方会发 blog

7⃣交易品种覆盖还行，BTC / ETH / SOL / 黄金这些主流资产都有，还支持 QQQ 和 SPY（纳指和标普指数），个股也能交易。
产品数量不算特别丰富，但日常交易够用了。

8⃣最后说点我个人的态度。
永续赛道我一直不建议盲目跟，也不建议一次性铺太多项目，两个差不多，三个是上限，再多精力根本顾不过来，两个正好方便跨平台对冲。

更重要的一点——永续、预测市场这类需要真金白银投入的项目，一定要以盈利为第一目标。

如果做不到稳定盈利，纯靠磨本金去博空投预期，那你最后拿到多少完全取决于项目方的格局和当时的大盘环境。

万一 BTC 暴跌一波，或者项目方格局不够反撸一下，本金就直接打水漂了。

9⃣所以我的结论是：
有交易能力、能在交互里顺带盈利的朋友，可以把 Nado 加进组合里搭配 Kraken 玩；
没有独立判断能力、纯刷毛心态的，这个赛道其实不太适合深度参与。

Been a little over a week since I started trading on a new DEX so thought I’d share some early thoughts

I’ve been testing @nadoHQ which is currently in private alpha. Access is invite only and still pretty limited so it’s very early days.

What caught my attention is that Nado is built on Ink, the L2 launched by @krakenfx . Kraken isn’t running the exchange but Ink gives Nado the kind of infrastructure you actually need for a real orderbook based DEX fast execution, low fees and high throughput.

Nado is aiming to bring spot + perpetuals with unified margin on decentralized rails. If you’ve used orderbooks on CEXs, the experience here feels much closer to that than most DeFi setups.

One thing I genuinely like is the mobile trading experience. Nado has OCT (One-Click Trading) which means I don’t need to approve a transaction every single time I open or close a trade. That makes trading on my phone way smoother, especially for active positions.

After a week of trading the platform feels surprisingly smooth for a private alpha. Obviously its still early and things can change but this is the kind of project I like to get involved with before it’s crowded.

If you’re looking for access and I still have invites left, DM me and I’ll respond.

nado points might be one of the most mispriced perp farms rn

people look at it like “just another perpdex”

but the real trade is different:

@nadoHQ  is built on @inkonchain 
ink is @krakenfx chain
kraken is a top global cex

and exchange ecosystems can get stupid valuations

rough comps:
> $bnb / binance - $86b mcap
> $mantle / bybit - $2b mcap
> $okb / okx - $1.7b mcap
> $bgb / bitget - $1.4b mcap
> $kcs / kucoin - $1b mcap

now assume ink launches around $600-800m fdv

if only 10% of that goes to nado incentives / ecosystem rewards, that’s already:

> $60m-$80m potential reward pool

nado points math:

> season 1 started jan 30
> 950k points distributed weekly
> 15 weeks passed = 14.25m points
> + 2m transition/private alpha points
> ~16.25m points emitted so far

if rewards stopped today:

> $60m pool = $3.69/point
> $80m pool = $4.92/point

even if season runs much longer and total points reach ~30-35m:

> $60m pool = ~$1.70-$2.00/point
> $80m pool = ~$2.25-$2.65/point

that’s the part people are missing

you’re not only farming a small perp dex

you’re farming exposure to the kraken/ink ecosystem before most ct is even paying attention

nado points come from:
> trading
> nlp
> referrals that bring real users

so this is not a “click button and pray” farm

it’s a real usage farm on a cex-backed chain

my take:

if ink becomes even a mid-tier exchange ecosystem, nado points can reprice hard

Why I'm farming @nadoHQ  right now while the perps market is in the gutter?

TGE expectation — end of Q3, so autumn. That's months away. So why farm now?

Simple. I'm looking for ways to stack as many points as possible without blindly burning capital.

Kraken planned an IPO at $20B valuation and cancelled it recently. Bad market conditions. When they resume IPO plans — and they will — there's gonna be a new wave of hype around Nado. 

Point price goes up, everyone rushes to farm, and farming becomes 3-5x harder than it is today.

My strategy right now: 
I only grind when there's a boost. X3/X4 boost on any market = I go in hard and rack up volume. 
The moment the boost disappears — I do nothing. I have ~$250k in open positions hedged on Ethereal. That's it. Low maintenance.

On valuation. 
The lowest realistic price Nado can launch at — $0.40 per point. Any farming cost below that is pure profit for me. My expected point price is $1-2 in the best market conditions. Base case — $1.

I'm deliberately sandbagging my estimates here. With BackPack we all got too optimistic on a good market and it came out like shit. Not making that mistake again with Nado.

Behind NaDo stands a $20B real company — not some fake exchange like BackPack. If even 5% of Kraken's value goes to their L2 — and that's very likely — the lowest fair valuation is $500M-$1B. 
But I'm pricing it at $300M which gives $0.40 per point. That's the worst case scenario. And even then I'm looking at ~2x on my current farm.

Absolute no-brainer. But if that's not enough for you — let's talk in six months when the point is worth two bucks.

Introducing @nadoHQ  - the Orderbook DEX built on @inkonchain Network

Nado is a next-generation DeFi trading platform bringing centralized-exchange performance to a fully on-chain environment.

Built as an orderbook-based DEX, Nado supports:

Spot trading
Perpetuals
Margin trading
Unified margin across markets

All while remaining non-custodial and transparent.

Unlike typical AMM DEXs, Nado uses an on-chain orderbook, giving traders:

Precise price execution
Deeper liquidity modeling
A familiar CEX-like trading experience

The team behind Nado brings experience from Kraken, focusing on performance, risk management, and professional-grade tooling.

Nado is deployed on Ink, a new Ethereum Layer-2 built with Optimism’s OP Stack and supported by Kraken.

Ink provides:

Fast finality
Low transaction fees
Ethereum security
Native DeFi focus

This makes Ink an ideal foundation for high-performance financial applications like Nado.

Ink is the infrastructure.
Nado is the trading layer.

Together, they aim to deliver a scalable, professional DeFi trading experience — without compromising decentralization.

Currently in alpha / beta, Nado is actively onboarding early users and testers as it moves toward a full public launch.

let me put it into a different perspective for you what season 02 on @nadoHQ actually incentivizes 

to put it in simple terms, you basically get exponentially rewarded on how hard you work for your own bag - different advantages for different account types

—————————————

small account? no problem 

- the more people you refer, the more you get rewarded 
-> from points only to hybrid -> commission on fees + points 
- minimum of $1k capital to take part in trading competitions with prizes up to $100k: 
1. competition: BASED ON ROI, NOT NOTIONAL DOLLAR VALUE
-> so your small account still can earn big if you have the skill to run it up
2. competition: based on Volume and only Main-Accounts are eligible which means no bots can outperform you because the bots mostly need a sub-account for access

bigger account? 

- the bigger your account, the more exactly your fee rank gets
- the more volume you do, the more points get distributed overall but the distribution occurs on your individual trading activity 
- don’t wanna „gift“ smaller accounts your volume tier based rewards? okay, not so cool because that’s how you build communities but still you can join now without needing an invite - open for everybody 

 —————————————

capital efficiency 

- fiat on/off ramps 
- global risk engine - every asset in your pocket as cross-collateral 
—> an underestimated power - for small accounts even more important when they usually can’t spread their capital too wide 

and all this with every tokenized market 24/7 - no position ever again tied to TradFi hours

Perpetual DEXs are everywhere right now, especially after the strong drop from Lighter ; so it’s worth taking a closer look at @NadoHQ

Nado is a CLOB-based DEX that introduces a unified margin across spot, margin, and perpetual trading

For clarity, CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) is a system where all buy and sell orders are gathered in one transparent, centralized order book

This structure is what powers most traditional exchanges and it’s exactly what Nado brings to the perp DEX space, setting it apart from many existing models

The platform is currently live and testable. 

By depositing funds and placing trades, you can explore what appears to be an early alpha stage, though early access often comes before the wider crowd notices

➜ How to Get Started;

-Visit nado(.)xyz
-Click “Launch App”
-Enter a referral code (you can use: djyHadU)
-Make a deposit

➜ How to Deposit;

Nado is built by the Kraken team and is deployed on the Ink blockchain

To fund your account, you’ll need to bridge assets to Ink using a service like Jumper.

Minimum deposit: $5

Opportunities like this tend to reward those who arrive early. In the long run, this could mean more than it looks like today.

Your biggest advantage is timing, so don’t ignore it.

-交易即赚积分 - 每周分配，奖励真实交易行为

Nado 积分计划的第一章正式开启！由 海妖@krakenfx  团队打造的中央限价订单簿去中心化交易所（CLOB DEX）今天迎来了 Open Beta Season 1 的启动，这标志着项目从私人测试阶段正式转向公开测试，所有用户现在都可以通过真实交易行为开始累积积分。

Season 1 引入了全新的每周积分分配系统，专门奖励协议内的有机交易活动。无论你是进行现货交易还是使用高达 20 倍杠杆的永续合约，所有交易行为都会被实时索引并计入积分系统。这些 Nado Points 未来将可转换为 $INK 代币，虽然具体的转换率和分发机制将在代币生成事件前公布，但这无疑为早期参与者提供了巨大的价值捕获机会。

Nado 构建在 Ink L2 网络上，提供了真正的机构级交易体验。平台支持统一保证金交易，让你可以用一个账户管理多个仓位，同时享受多抵押品选项和 5-15 毫秒的超低延迟。这种专业级的基础设施，配合去中心化的安全性，正是 DeFi 交易的未来方向。

值得一提的是，就在 Season 1 启动前一天，Nado 刚刚完成了官方 NFT 系列“Templars of the Storm”的 1200 件铸造和分发。已在 OpenSea上线交易，地板价0.5eth。结合交易、积分和数字收藏品，Nado 正在构建一个完整的 DeFi 生态系统。

现在正是参与的最佳时机，早期阶段是拿分的最佳时期。

🔥 NADO DAY

I'm starting a series of posts about @nadoHQ  and how it can be farmed AS EFFICIENTLY as possible.

If you look at the PERP-DEX market right now - for me there are only two favorites: NADO & @variational_io .

🤨 First, why NADO?

Here, unlike VARIATIONAL, there are more unknowns. If in the first one, after the investment everything became clear (https://t.co/4urJfMuOdV), in NADO there are more unknowns. How many points they will hand out. When TGE. What % they will allocate to the drop and so on.

But this always plays both ways.

✔️ It's good, because - as soon as we get the concrete % for the drop - we'll immediately see clearer math and an explosion of volumes - if it's very good 🤩

And together with that, competition will grow several times. This is the main rule, if everything is known - you are no longer early. Farming gets harder and the same good math deteriorates.

❌ It's bad, because there's a probability that they'll give a small % for the drop and we'll farm for a small profit or even a loss.

But nothing can be done about it here. In retro we always play with probabilities.

The earlier you place your bet - the more upside you have for x's (or a rekt).

As examples of what I'm talking about - farming NADO and VARIATIONAL 3-4 months ago. Yes, the projects looked worse and not as promising at that moment. But those who believed earlier - farmed points at a price MUCH lower than now.

You can also bring up LIGHTER as an example, but it seems to me everyone already knows this case. Those who started in the Spring - could simply catch LIFECHANGE in 1 week of work.

❓ What do we have now

NADO - part of the INK ecosystem. INK - a subsidiary of KRAKEN. That's it. At this moment - this is the biggest argument.

POLYMARKET values INK's launch at 500M at 78%, at 1 BLN at 39%.

If the market is green by Autumn we can easily see even 2 BLN, both on NADO and on VARIATIONAL.

Yes, maybe everything won't be so positive, and the projects won't come out even at 1 bln, but as I said above In retro we always play with probabilities
But the fact that KRAKEN and VARIATIONAL have ambitions - is obvious.

What's new in the project?

Launched SEASON 2, in which

- Changed the number of points allocated per week. Now there will be a progressive scale, according to which there will be from 350k to 900k points per week

- Removed the additional points that were allocated to builders, trading campaigns and so on.

You can read about it Here (https://t.co/rFwz0OpZFE)

For us this means that points have become more expensive, mining them will be harder, and those who farmed earlier - got a good boost.

- Launched a new trading campaign with a $100k prize pool. The campaign will run in two directions, ROI & VOLUME.
The campaign is held here (https://t.co/xj9SYwKg1y) and you must register to participate.

☠️ Does this mean that farming is harder, that it's already too late?

Yes, it's harder. No, it's not too late. We don't know what's next in the plans. If at some point they say that they're giving 15-20% drop on the project, the market goes up and they start drawing a conditional 1.5 BLN potential exit, then the farming math will fly even higher, and competition will do another 2-3x.

If you're starting today or looking at the PERP-DEX market, I'd just advise everyone to split forces, allocate budget and spend it all 50/50 on two projects. NADO & VARIATIONAL.

To value Nado points, we first need to understand that $INK isn’t just a native token for Nado. It’s the utility token for the entire @krakenfx ecosystem.

Here are 3 key factors influencing the point price:

1️⃣ FDV: Since $INK is an ecosystem token, we should compare it to L2 heavyweights like $LINEA, $POL, $OP, $ARB or $MNT. Their FDV currently ranges from $270M to $4.3B.

2️⃣ Airdrop Allocation: Since $INK covers the whole infrastructure, a massive % for Nado users alone is unlikely. I’m betting on a 10% allocation.

In a bear market, only two types of projects survive:
Well-backed infrastructure and products with real revenue paths.

That’s why I’m paying attention to Nado (@nadoHQ).
Built on Ink, Kraken’s L2, Nado isn’t trying to reinvent hype, it’s building serious trading infrastructure.
Orderbook-based, fast, non-custodial, and designed for real traders, not tourists.

Season 1 runs on weekly epochs.
Every week, activity is tracked continuously (trading, liquidity provision, referrals), and a weekly snapshot aggregates your entire week, not just a single moment.
Points are then distributed every Friday, proportional to your share of real usage, meaning consistency matters more than one-off volume.

Ink backing matters. Kraken backing matters.And early access matters even more.

Opportunities like this don’t show up when markets are euphoric, they show up now.

If you’re still looking for something underrated, credible, and early, this might be one of the few left.

Speed + Security + Trust + Proven Team = Generational opportunity.

등이 있음

Hyperliquid 가 자체 체인으로 Valuation 을 $3~5B 로 예상되던 것을 ATH $60B 로 퀀텀점프 시켰기에,
Lighter, edgeX 뿐 아니라 Dango, 01 같은 애들까지 자기 체인을 하겠다고 덤비는데,
사실 체인을 운영한다는건 PerpDEX 와는 또 차원이 다른 어려움을 가진 일이라고 생각함
그 어려움을 뚫어냈기에 하리가 Value 를 인정받은 것이지, 그냥 체인만 만든다고 벨류업이 된다고 생각하는건 어불성설 (인데 많이들 그렇게 보고 덤비는듯)

위에 언급한 별도 체인의 지원을 받는 친구들은 나름 현명한 플레이를 하고 있다고 생각됨
자체 Valuation 이 '성공했을 때의' 자체 체인 PerpDEX 보다 낮을 수는 있지만,
그만큼 안정적인 플레이가 가능할 것임

또한 접근하는 유저 관점에서도,
'만약 대동강물을 퍼마실수 있다면' 최대한 그것을 이용해서 안전한 파밍을 할 수 있지 않을까?!

Bluefin 을 생각해보면, SUI 를 받아서 '잘 팔았'다면, 수이동강 만으로 수수료 멘징이 가능했었음
뭐... 블루핀 에드 자체는 좀 안좋긴 했다만..

그리고 또한 체인 관점에서도, PerpDEX 를 성공시키기만 하면, 그래도 일단은 스테이블 코인은 락인이 되는거고
트잭도 어느정도 찍힐테고,
그러면서 Spot 마켓도 깔짝거린다던지 하는 선택지들도 있고,
직접 운영시에 수수료 수입도 노려볼 수 있고
여러모로 나쁘지 않은 선택인것 같다

물론 '잘' 할 경우에 이긴 하지만

그런 의미에서 INK 의 Nado 가 제일 현명하다고 봄
물론 유저 관점에서는 에드가 맛있기 매우 힘들것으로 보이지만,
Ink 관점에서는, 이미 PerpDEX 경험이 있는 Vertex 팀을 인수한거고,
별도 토큰 안만들고 체인의 INK 토큰을 공유하는거라 부담도 적고 (물론 물량 떼주는 부담감은 있지만, 내가 팀이라면 절대 많이 안떼어줌...)

뭐 아무튼 이래저래 좋았던 거야... 솔리드한 천생연분인것 같다

@inkonchain just dropped the first INK points, and they’re even rewarding Kraken Pro users.

> @perpltrade  
launched private mainnet couple weeks ago on Monad, so not much to say yet. tbh right now it kinda feels like a vibe-coded platform, just with $9m+ raise. it's ok, only testing period on mainnet.

also a little bit sad to see, at this stage they prioritize to add first leaderboard over something like a "report a bug" button. not sure it makes much sense this early, but it's their project, and they know better what to do.

wish them only all the best. who knows, mb they end up being the one project that can justify the existence of the purple chain!

Farming @nadoHQ? 
You might wanna read this. 
I tried all sorts of bots at first, like @tread_fi and @Flowbot_pro. 
Then one day I saw a post from @nadoHQ and someone in the comments was shilling a bot called @NeutraFinance for volume farming with positive PnL. So I joined their Discord and asked for more info, and the owner posted about a competition. I figured I'd try the bot, so I connected my wallet. The minimum was $500, so I started a session, and after 2 minutes, my $500 was gone! I had a stop loss, and I couldn't even cancel the bot through Nado. After the loss, I messaged the owner and asked why the stop loss didn't execute or why I couldn't stop the bot, and he made some excuses. I said, "Okay, at least let me get some funds from your competition that you posted." A couple of days later, he told me the competition was canceled and blocked me. So watch out for scammers like @NeutraFinance.

[@nadoHQ 늪 나름 괜찮은데.. 계산이 너무 어렵다. ] 

어제 나도 늪이 나왔습니다. 현재 오픈씨 기준 0.42이더 정도 합니다. 솔직히 말하면 너무 팔고 싶었습니다. 

 타이밍을 놓친 것도 맞고.. 조금은 믿음이 있는 것도 맞습니다. 생각보다 혜택이 애매합니다. 

포인트 배수, 그리고 수수료 차감 정도가 있습니다. 

솔직히 저는 고래가 아닙니다. 그리고 리스크를 최소화 하기 때문에 제 자산에 많은 돈을 운용하지 않습니다. 어쩌다가 진짜로 범죄가 일어나면 양빵이라고 해도 큰 손해가 날 수 있기 때문입니다. 

고래에게 0.01프로와 저의 0.01프로는 진짜 몇억이 차이 날 수도 있기 때문에 고민이 많이 됩니다. 

이 늪을 가지고 6주 정도.. 살짝 진심.. 펀치를 날리면 얼마를 벌 수 있을지 모르겠지만 해외 트윗을 보니깐 포당 1불~2불 사이를 보고 있더라고요. 그러니.. 우선은 늪을 팔지말고 이번주 파밍을 열심히 해보고! 그 다음에 결정하는 것이 나을 것 같다는 생각이 듭니다. 

매주 베리에이셔널도 지금.. 1포~2포 밖에 못받고 있는 상황이라서 하하 요즘 에드작이 참 쉽지 않은 것 같습니다. 

그리고 나도는 빌더 혜택도 있으니..! 뭔가 뭔가 뭔가 x에 글을 쓰는 행위 또한 꽤 도움이 되지 않을까!? 라는 생각을 해봅니다.

[@nadoHQ 늪 안팔린김에 6주동안 좀 해보려고 함..] 

제가 생각한 가격에 늪을 팔지 못했스니다. 사실 고래가 아니라서 나도 늪을 잘 활용할 자신이 없었습니다. 그렇지만 계속해서 고민했던 것이 어떻게 잘 파밍할까.. 였습니다. 

2가지 정도 해보려고 합니다. 

원래는 실매매를 해서 큰 손해 없이.. NFT를 받았습니다만 엊그제 미친 하락에 300불 정도 날려먹었습니다. 대응을 제대로 못했습니다. 사실 그냥 에휴~ 그래 청산시켜라!!!! 하고 안봤는데 청산 당했습니다. 81k까지 올거라고 생각도 못했는데 지금은 78k네요.. 

아무튼 그래서 6주 동안 초기 알파 진입자들에게 혜택이 있다고 하니 2가지 방법을 써보려고 합니다. 딱 6주만 파밍하고 그만 두려고 합니다. 양빵치는게 아니라면..! 

1. @tread_fi 이용 

나도는 대충 둘러보니깐 OI보단 볼륨이 훨씬 중요해보이더라고요. 그래서 tread_fi를 좀 이용해보려고 합니다. 

우선 MM봇을 어떻게 구동하는지 잘몰라서 소액으로 실험해봤습니다. 

한번 해보니깐 대충 감 오더라고요. 근데 이게 큰 금액은 상관없는데 소액은.. 언제 돌리냐고 조금 중요해보이더라고요. 큰 변동성 없이 횡보할 때 돌리는 것이 좋아보여서..! 그때가 언젠지 몰라서 간단하게 제 사이트로 적기일 때를 코딩했습니다. 

MM 타이밍을 나타내는데 80점 이상일 때.. 돌리는 것이 이상적이겠더라고요. 지금은 어제 폭락으로 돌리기 조금은 애매한 시점인데 오늘은 큰 변동성이 없을 것 같아서 돌려볼까 합니다. 

2. X에 다가 NADO 관련 글 쓰기.. 

솔직히 카이토가 망한 이후로 info-fi가 쉽지 않은 것이라는 건 잘 알고 있습니다. 그렇지만 NADO에서 에어드랍 기준 중에서 

Builder codes라는 것이 있더라고요. 솔직히 제가 빌더는 아니지만..! 그래도 X에 글 쓰는 것은 돈이 안들기 때문에 일주일에 1개 정도는 쓰려고 합니다. 

이렇게 심어놓은 것들이 나중에 힘을 보여줄 때가 가끔 있더라고요. 물론 아닐 가능성도 높습니다. 허허 

참 쉽지 않은 시기 입니다. 저도 코접 너무 마려운데 꼭 위기에서 기회가 많더라고요. 비트 싸게 살 수 있는 기회라고 생각하고 비트 좀 담고 펍덱도 꾸준히 해보려고 합니다. 화이팅입니다!

ライブで議論された内容です@nadoHQ×@inkonchainSpaceのスレッドまとめこのスレッドは、@InkDailyTKが投稿したもので、@nadoHQ（Nado）と@inkonchain（Ink）の共同スペースイベントから得られたキー情報をまとめています。Nadoは単なる永続的デリバティブ取引所（perp DEX）ではなく、Inkブロックチェーン上で完全なトレーディングエコシステムを目指している点が強調されています。以下に、5つの投稿からなるスレッドの主なポイントを日本語でまとめます。

1. 全体の概要とビジョンNadoの目標：トレーダーがフルで取引を実行できるワンストッププラットフォームになること。
具体例：Ex（おそらくExchangeの意）でNvidia株を購入、Nvidia Perpでショートポジションをヘッジ、すべてモバイルから直接実行可能。
コアデザイン：統一マージン（Unified Margin）で、FDXからImpへ進化。業界全体に広がるスタンダードなクロスエクスチェンジを目指す。
CLOAアーキテクチャ：セントラルリミットオーダーブック（Central Limit Order Book）で、レバレッジ取引の資金調達メカニズムを活用。

2. RWA & XStocks統合近日実装予定：QQQxとSPYxを担保として使用可能。トークナイズドされた米国株式を保有し、それに対するperp取引が可能。
大きなニュース：XStocksFi統合が30日以内に予定。TradFi（伝統金融）の戦略が完全にオンチェーンに移行。
すでにライブ：XStocksがInk上で利用可能。

3. Upcoming Catalyst（今後の触媒）
4月のトレーディングコンペティション：期間：4週間。
賞金プール：4,000,000ポイント。
内容：ウィークリートラック + 隠し達成クエスト。
これにより、Nadoへのユーザー流入が大きく期待される。

After the hype I stirred up around @grvt_io , I’m scaling back a bit now and putting my main focus on @nadoHQ .

Nado is a perpetual futures DEX that actually feels like a centralized exchange (real CLOB order book), built on Ink L2 Kraken’s own Ethereum Layer 2 running on the Optimism Superchain.
It has unified / cross-margin for everything (spot + perps + unrealized PnL all in one single pool), super-low matching latency of ~5–15 ms making it one of the fastest on-chain perp DEXes right now, with full self-custody and DeFi-level security.
Currently in Open Beta Season 1: you farm Ink Points + Nado points, and “Templars of the Storm” NFTs give you multipliers and fee discounts.

Live on-chain stats (as of Feb 27, 2026 – sourced from DefiLlama):
- Open Interest (OI): $82.33M
- 24h Perp Volume: $386.49M
- 7d Volume: $2.43B
- 30d Volume: $15.36B
       - Cumulative Perp Volume: $41.41B
- 24h Fees: ~$78.6K | Revenue: ~$53.2K

It’s still a small-to-mid tier project compared to the big boys.
The entire perp DEX market currently has ~$13.6–13.9B in OI and ~$23B in 24h volume.
Hyperliquid alone handles ~$6B 24h volume + ~$5.4–5.5B OI (roughly 40% of the whole market).
Nado sits at about ~0.6% of total OI and a similar share of daily volume → which puts it in the top 12–15 perp DEXes worldwide, but still well behind the top 5 (Hyperliquid, Aster, edgeX, Lighter, GRVT, etc.).
That said, it’s growing fast: from private alpha (with ~$17B monthly volume in January) straight into open beta real potential for a breakout.

Who’s behind Nado?
It’s built in-house by Kraken’s core engineering team (no single flashy public founder like Armani at Lighter).
Kraken (founded in 2011 by Jesse Powell, 10M+ users, billions in revenue, IPO reportedly planned for 2026) is the full backer. Ink is their L2, and Nado is their flagship DeFi application.
They bring real experience building deep liquidity, execution engines, and risk systems not just hype experiments which is exactly why the UI feels so professional and the speed is insane.

Why this could blow up in 2026:
- Kraken’s massive distribution 10M+ CEX users ready for easy DeFi onboarding. Ink apps already generated $5.77M revenue in January alone (annualized run-rate ~$48M+).
- Clear tech advantage fastest on-chain CLOB (~5-15 ms), unified margin + NLP vaults for passive yield, SDKs for bots and quants perfect for pro traders escaping CEX regulations and custody risks.
- Airdrop rocket fuel $INK token is confirmed, with the majority of the airdrop going to Nado users (retroactive points convert 100% to $INK), plus NFT multipliers 
- farming frenzy is basically guaranteed in a bull market.
- Perfect timing perp DEX sector is exploding (total OI already over $13B), and Nado is filling the credible mid-tier spot. If Kraken’s IPO lands well + we get a real bull run → the “Kraken DeFi” narrative could easily 10× the volume.

Low-risk / high-reward setup: battle-tested backer, not just VC hype. Main risks are beta bugs and a young L2, but with Kraken behind it this feels like a very solid play.

错过 Hyperliquid 没关系，别再错过 @inkonchain  链上的 @nadoHQ 了。🔥

当前全网都在寻找 Ink 生态的入场券，而 Nado 毫无疑问是目前最确定的“头矿”机会。作为  @krakenfx  嫡系团队打造的链上基础设施，它不仅仅是一个 DEX，更像是 Kraken 在链上的“影子帝国”。

为什么现在必须盯着它？👇

1️⃣ 早期红利 + 官方背书Nado 目前处于极早期的 Beta 测试阶段。按照过往公链发展的逻辑，作为 Ink 链上的“创世级”应用，早期交互往往对应着最高的权重。
 👉 重点： 埋伏 Nado 极大概率是“一箭双雕”——既博取 Nado 未来的代币份额，又是低成本获取 Ink 链潜在空投的最佳路径。

2️⃣ 重新定义“链上交易”还在忍受链上土狗盘的卡顿？Nado 带来了真正的 “链上币安”体验。

极致丝滑： 毫秒级延迟，完全复刻中心化交易所（CEX）的手感。

资金效率革命： 独家的全仓保证金模式，让你的现货和合约共享资金池，未结利润直接当本金用。这对于中小资金用户来说，是极其友好的“滚仓利器”。

3️⃣ 如何埋伏？目前测试资格非常稀缺（邀请制），社区热度正在极速攀升。现在官方为每一个Nado的早期用户提供了10个邀请码。我自己用掉一个，还剩9个 ，需要的自取。链接放在评论区

预期：现在的每一个交互，都可能是未来的“金铲子”。

While everyone is saying how great farming @nadoHQ will be, I have the opposite idea.

Farming Nado is likely -EV in 2026.

Mainly because you do not get Nado's own token, but rather an allocation of $INK.

How much allocation does Nado traders realistically get? I don't think it's more than 2-5%.

On top of that, if @inkonchain hhave their TGE during the bear market, the FDV is suppressed as people dump their airdrops for stables.

Better to just spend that money buying BTC as we head further down. If BTC ever gets down to the 50-60 range, the R/R is massive there.

NADO @nadoHQ  是一个部署在 Ink L2（由 Kraken 团队推出的 Superchain L2）上的高性能 CLOB型去中心化交易所，支持现货（Spot）、永续合约（Perps）和部分货币市场功能。

它由 Kraken 团队部分成员开发，被视为 Ink 生态的旗舰 Perp DEX，目前仍处于早期阶段（邀请制 + 积分活动），目标是通过交易量、做市、推荐等方式积累积分，未来大概率会与 $INK 代币空投挂钩。

参与链接：https://t.co/SaedNZ9WMt

要先跨链资产到Ink网络，获取邀请码，然后赚取积分。
积分权重：
1.永续合约交易量
★★★★★
2.现货交易量
★★★★
3.NLP 流动性提供
★★★★
存 USDT0 到 Nado Liquidity Provider vault，赚取手续费 + 积分
4.Referral
★★★
邀请新用户交易可获得其积分的百分比分成
5.持有特定 NFT
★★
早期有 NFT 加成，目前基本抢不到了
6.其他任务
★
偶尔有社交任务或持有 xStocks 等生态资产加成

1. Spot + Perps + Lending in one stack
2. Unified margin across all positions
3. CEX-like speed (5–15 ms matching), onchain risk & settlement

Architecture:
• Offchain CLOB & matching engine
• Onchain clearing house (PnL, margin, risk)
• Built on Ink (Kraken’s EVM L2 in the Optimism Superchain)

Products:
• Perps (majors up to 20×)
• Margin-enabled spot trading
• Money markets (lend/borrow with same collateral)

Liquidity:
• NLP Vault (USDT0-only)
• Passive yield from spreads + liquidations
• NLP shares usable as margin collateral

Private alpha signals:
- $5B+ perp volume in ~3 weeks
- ~$400M avg daily volume
- $40M+ open interest
- NLP vault filled at $2M cap

Positioning:
CEX-grade performance, DeFi self-custody.

For @nadoHQ users, if u were trading with first leverage and see margin few times lower, dont worry about that

That's all about Nado tecnology, you are using unified margin which make your capital work efficenlty 

We have great example of that in Nado Docs that can explain us that

Traders may see cases such as:

A $4,000 notional position

Max leverage: 20x

Selected leverage: 5x

Actual margin used: ~$200, because the risk engine is applying the market’s leverage parameters, not the front-end slider.

Unified margin is designed to maximize capital efficiency, allowing Nado’s risk engine to evaluate your account holistically rather than locking collateral per position. The leverage slider remains a tool for controlling order size, not a determinant of allocated margin.

You can read more about that here
https://t.co/BNWCc3l6fn
